name: Saffron rice with barberries, pistachio & mixed herbs

ingredients.item: 2 cups / 360 g basmati rice, rinsed under cold water and drained well
ingredients.original: 2 cups / 360 g basmati rice, rinsed under cold water and drained well

ingredients.item: 1 tsp saffron threads, soaked in 3 tbsp boiling water for 30 minutes
ingredients.original: 1 tsp saffron threads, soaked in 3 tbsp boiling water for 30 minutes

ingredients.item: ¼ cup / 40 g dried barberries, soaked for a few minutes in boiling water with a pinch of sugar
ingredients.original: ¼ cup / 40 g dried barberries, soaked for a few minutes in boiling water with a pinch of sugar

ingredients.item: ⅔ oz / 20 g chervil, coarsely chopped
ingredients.original: ⅔ oz / 20 g chervil, coarsely chopped

ingredients.item: ⅓ oz / 10 g tarragon, coarsely chopped
ingredients.original: ⅓ oz / 10 g tarragon, coarsely chopped

ingredients.item: ½ cup / 60 g slivered or crushed unsalted pistachios, lightly toasted
ingredients.original: ½ cup / 60 g slivered or crushed unsalted pistachios, lightly toasted
